query: SELECT e.id, e.title, e.eventDate, e.videoLink FROM events e WHERE e.videoLink IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scheduled_webinars sw WHERE LOWER(TRIM(sw.title)) = LOWER(TRIM(e.title)) AND sw.youtubeLink IS NOT NULL AND sw.youtubeLink != '') ORDER BY e.eventDate DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT e.id, e.title, e.eventDate, e.videoLink FROM events e WHERE e.videoLink IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scheduled_webinars sw WHERE LOWER(TRIM(sw.title)) = LOWER(TRIM(e.title)) AND sw.youtubeLink IS NOT NULL AND sw.youtubeLink != '') ORDER BY e.eventDate DESC;
